dialogues.text: Hey citizen, we're running short on squad car fuel. Spare $5?
dialogues.yes_response: Appreciate it. Stay out of trouble.

dialogues.text: I lost my lunch money today. Could you lend me $3?
dialogues.yes_response: You're a good person. I won't forget this.
dialogues.no_response: Can't blame you. Have a safe night.

dialogues.text: Someone dumped trash near the east wall. Clean it up and I'll owe you one.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. That's civic duty right there.

dialogues.text: Radio's busted. If you find spare batteries, bring them to me — I'll give you $8.
Charity drive for the precinct — just $2 keeps the coffee machine running.
There's a missing dog report on Pine Street. If you spot it, let me know — worth $6.
dialogues.no_response: No worries. Dog probably found its own way.

dialogues.text: Equipment fund needs $10 this week. Every bit helps.
Someone spray-painted the wall by the alley. I need a witness statement — got a minute?
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Just describe what you saw.

dialogues.text: Officer's retirement fund. Even $4 makes a difference.
dialogues.yes_response: Good on you. Serve and protect.
dialogues.no_response: No pressure. Just... remember us when you need us.

dialogues.text: I need someone to post flyers around the block. $7 if you do it.
dialogues.yes_response: Perfect. Grab the stack from that bench.
dialogues.no_response: Fine. I'll get a rookie to do it.
